descriptionTemplate: Add 2 {Decapitation Damage} to your hand and grant them {Exhaust}, {Prepare 1}, and {Retain}. Increase the Base DMG of {Blade's Dominion} and {Decapitation Damage} by 25% for this battle. Goliath obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Add 3 {Blade's Dominion} to your hand. Increase the Base DMG of {Blade's Dominion} and {Decapitation Damage} by 25% in this battle. Goliath obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.
